items.title: Loan Societies Act 1840 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act to amend the Laws relating to Loan Societies.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Commissioners Act 1840
items.description: An Act to carry into effect, with certain Modifications, the Fourth Report of the Commissioners of Ecclesiastical Duties and Revenues.

items.title: Tithe Act 1840 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act further to explain and amend the Acts for the Commutation of Tithes in England and Wales.

items.title: Queen Anne’s Bounty Act 1840
items.description: An Act to amend an Act passed in the First Year of the Reign of His late Majesty King George the First, intituled An Act for rendering more effectual Her late Majesty's gracious Intentions for the Augmentation of the Maintenance of the Poor Clergy ; and to render valid certain Agreements which have been made in pursuance of the said Act; and for other Purposes.

items.title: Entail Sites Act 1840 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to enable Proprietors of Entailed Estates in Scotland to feu or lease on long Leases Portions of the same for the building of Churches and Schools, and for Dwelling Houses and Gardens for the Ministers and Masters thereof.

items.title: Evidence (Scotland) Act 1840
items.description: An Act for the Amendment of the Law of Evidence in Scotland.

items.title: Oyster Fisheries (Scotland) Act 1840
items.description: An Act for the better Protection of the Oyster Fisheries in Scotland.

items.title: Metropolitan Police Courts Act 1840
items.description: An Act for better defining the Powers of Justices within the Metropolitan Police District.

items.title: Parliamentary Papers Act 1840
items.description: An Act to give summary Protection to Persons employed in the Publication of Parliamentary Papers.

items.title: Non-Parochial Registers Act 1840
items.description: An Act for enabling Courts of Justice to admit Non-parochial Registers as Evidence of Births or Baptisms, Deaths or Burials, and Marriages.
